message:
Fix security vulnerabilities and bugs from code review

Security fixes:
- install.sh/route.ts: Sanitize idsParam to prevent command injection
- PromptContent.tsx: Add SAFE_PROMPT_ID validation in buildInstallCommand
- PromptDetailModal.tsx: Add SAFE_PROMPT_ID validation in buildInstallCommand

Bug fixes:
- suggest.ts: Use ?? instead of || for limit option to allow --limit 0
- PromptContent.tsx: Add prompt.id to handleCopy dependency array

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
